clause_text: The user represents, warrants and covenants that its use of Naukri.com shall not be done in a manner so as to Access the Platform for purposes of extracting content to be used for training a machine learning or AI model, without the express prior written permission.
The user shall not Violate any applicable local, provincial, state, national or international law, statute, ordinance, rule or regulation;
The user shall not Interfere with or disrupt computer networks connected to Naukri.com;
The user shall not Impersonate any other person or entity, or make any misrepresentation as to your employment by or affiliation with any other person or entity;
The user shall not Forge headers or in any manner manipulate identifiers in order to disguise the origin of any user information;
The user shall not Interfere with or disrupt the use of Naukri.com by any other user, nor 'stalk', threaten, or in any manner harass another user;
The user shall not Use Naukri.com in such a manner as to gain unauthorized entry or access to the computer systems of others;
The user shall not Reproduce, copy, modify, sell, store, distribute or otherwise exploit for any commercial purposes Naukri.com, or any component thereof;
The user shall not Use content from the Site for derivative works with a commercial motive without prior written consent of the IEIL.
The user shall not Use any device, software or routine to interfere or attempt to interfere with the proper working of Naukri.com;
The user shall not Impose an unreasonable or disproportionately large load on Naukri.com infrastructure.
The user shall not Spam Naukri.com/IEIL by indiscriminately and repeatedly posting content or forwarding mail that may be considered spam etc.
The user shall not Access data not intended for you or log into server or account that you are not authorized to access;

The user shall not Constitute an act of reverse engineering, decompiling, disassembling, deciphering or otherwise attempting to derive the source code for the Site or any related technology or any part thereof
The user shall not Engage in 'framing,' 'mirroring,' or otherwise simulating the appearance or function of the Site
The user shall not Attempt to probe, scan or test the vulnerability of a system or network;
The user shall not Use automated means to crawl and/or scrape content from Naukri.com and to manually scrape content from Naukri.com;
The Site uses technological means to exclude Robots etc. from crawling it and scraping content.
You undertake not to circumvent these methods.
The user shall not Access the Site except through the interfaces expressly provided by IEIL;
Providing deeplinks into Naukri.com without prior permission of IEIL is prohibited.
Extracting data from Naukri.com using any automated process such as spiders, crawlers etc. or through any manual process for a purpose which has not been authorised in writing is prohibited.
The user shall not Upload, post, email, transmit or otherwise make available either directly or indirectly, any unsolicited bulk e-mail or unsolicited commercial e-mail.
Subscribers shall under no circumstance sublicense, assign, or transfer the License, and any attempt at such sublicense, assignment or transfer is void.

The user shall not Constitute hosting, modifying, uploading, posting, transmitting, publishing, or distributing any material or information For which you do not have all necessary rights and licenses;

The user shall not Constitute hosting, modifying, uploading, posting, transmitting, publishing, or distributing any material or information Which infringes, violates, breaches or otherwise contravenes the rights of any third party;

The user shall not Constitute hosting, modifying, uploading, posting, transmitting, publishing, or distributing any material or information Which contains a computer virus, or other code, files or programs intending in any manner to disrupt or interfere with the functioning of Naukri.com, or that of other computer systems;

The user shall not Constitute hosting, modifying, uploading, posting, transmitting, publishing, or distributing any material or information That is grossly harmful, harassing, invasive of another's privacy, hateful, disparaging, relating to money laundering or unlawful;

The user shall not infringe on any intellectual property rights of any person / entity or retain information / download any information from any computer system or otherwise with an intention to do so.
Info Edge (India) Ltd. will make best efforts to do so but does not warrant that any of the web sites or any affiliate site(s) or network system linked to it is free of any operational errors
Info Edge (India) Ltd. does not warrant that it will be free of any virus, computer contaminant, worm, or other harmful components.
The subscription of a user shall be subject to Quotas as applicable and as advised.

The CLIENT agrees to use only email addresses associated with a domain name officially owned by the CLIENT or BENEFICIARY EMPLOYER for its authorized user(s) when registering sub-users or conducting activities on their Naukri account.
Naukri reserves the right to suspend or terminate services if this condition is violated.
To protect your account and our services, we use automated systems and manual checks to detect unusual activity or outlier behavior.
If we identify elevated risk, we may require additional verification.
In some cases, you will be asked to install our application on your device to complete verification and regain access.
If you decline, your access to some or all features may be limited until an alternative verification is completed.
We may share limited data with service providers that help deliver the fraud prevention and security checks.
If you feel access to your account is limited or denied based on automated processing, you may request human review and contest the decision by contacting our support team
The decision of Info Edge post a human review will be final and binding.
You agree to install updates to the application when prompted, keep your device OS up to date, and not interfere with the Platforms security features.

By registering or logging in, you authorize Naukri.com to send you one-time verification codes and other security-related transactional messages by SMS to the mobile number linked to your log in/account.
We process your phone number, OTP verification data, and related technical logs to authenticate you, prevent fraud, and secure your account.
We may suspend or restrict access, or require additional verification, if we detect or suspect fraud, SIM swap, or unauthorized use.

The use and access to RESDEX database is subject to this policy. The services provided to you are aimed at providing recruitment solutions and should be restricted to contacting suitable candidates for genuine jobs in existence.
We reserve the right to terminate services, without prior notice, to the originator of Spam. No refund shall be admissible under such circumstances.
